summary: Shaji Pappan returns in another whirlwind of action and comedy, his local hero status firmly intact as he continues to wear his iconic black shirt and vibrant red mundu. The story begins at a routine police checkpoint on a bridge, where a simple van driver is caught in a moment of dramatic tension. This initial spark ignites a series of events that draw Shaji Pappan back into the spotlight. Shaji, ever the protector of his 'pilleru' (his team), finds himself face-to-face with suspicious police officers, attempting to explain away a load of questionable organic fertilizer as simple 'cow dung water.' The domestic life of Shaji is just as lively, as he shares his ambitious dreams with his mother—mentioning an international tug-of-war tournament with a massive registration fee but a staggering prize: a golden cup weighing half a kilogram. This quest for glory leads to intense training and a humorous encounter with a dramatically praying bald man at a local altar. The tournament itself is a high-octane affair, with Shaji leading his team through aggressive rope-pulling battles that eventually culminate in a triumphant victory and a wild celebration. However, the path to peace is never smooth. Shaji’s personal life intertwines with the bustling energy of a Kerala junction as he navigates a personal discussion with his wife amidst a busy crowd. The stakes rise as a building burns ominously in the background, signaling the entry of more dangerous forces. Saathan Xaviour reappears, opening a mysterious wooden box that leads to a conspiratorial meeting between Lazar and another man, who are fixated on a perfectly crafted duplicate currency note. Shaji Pappan eventually finds himself in the most unexpected of places: an official government office being congratulated for his accidental role in solving a national crisis. The story ends with Shaji standing tall, a national hero who, through pure grit and accidental brilliance, made the whole nation proud.

scenes.title: Police Bridge Check
scenes.description: A police checking scene on a bridge during daytime. Two police officers stand on the road stopping vehicles. A van driver inside a van is stopped in the middle of the bridge. One police officer raises his hand to stop the van. Cinematic Malayalam comic style, realistic lighting, bridge railings and road visible.

scenes.title: Dramatic Moment
scenes.description: Same bridge checking scene. Shaji Pappan (black shirt, red mundu, thick moustache) is talking nervously to the police officers. The police look angry and start to beat him after he speaks. Cinematic Malayalam comic style, dynamic expressions, dramatic shading.
scenes.dialogue: Man: Sir ee thottathilu valam ethileghi papanod sir samadhanam parayande varum..

scenes.title: Shaji Pappan Arrival
scenes.description: Roadside police checking scene. Shaji Pappan (black shirt, red mundu, thick moustache, slightly rugged face) stands near a vehicle explaining something to police officers. Police look suspicious. Style: Cinematic Malayalam comic style, realistic lighting, detailed Kerala roadside background.
scenes.dialogue: Shaji Pappan: Ith ente pillere sir ee..ithilu korach chanakavelam aleu..ath vittek.

scenes.title: The Golden Cup Plan
scenes.description: Inside a simple Kerala house. Shaji Pappan (black shirt, red mundu) sits talking to his mother. His mother listens carefully while sitting nearby. Style: Professional graphic novel, warm indoor lighting, detailed home background.
scenes.dialogue: Shaji: Internation tournamentaa..registration fees thnnne 50,000 roopaya.pakshe jeychal indalo ara kilo de Swarna kappa..

scenes.title: The Prayer
scenes.description: A house prayer corner. A bald man with hair only on the sides looks upward praying dramatically. Cinematic Malayalam comic style, dynamic expressions, detailed altar in background.
scenes.dialogue: Bald Person: Padachoneee kalla kachoadakarane katholane

scenes.title: Tug of War Competition
scenes.description: Tug of war competition ground. Two teams pulling rope aggressively. Crowds cheering in the background. Shaji Pappan and team visible. Style: High-octane action, dynamic composition, cinematic lighting.

scenes.title: Victory Celebration
scenes.description: Celebration moment at tug of war ground. Shaji Pappan and his team are cheering wildly. Confetti or dust in the air. Style: Vibrant colors, celebratory energy, cinematic Malayalam comic style.

scenes.title: The Junction Discussion
scenes.description: Roadside junction scene. Shaji Pappan (black shirt, red mundu, thick moustache) talks to his wife. Busy Kerala junction background with shops. Style: Detailed background, realistic lighting.
scenes.dialogue: Shaji: Moha banga manasileporunno nte koode..adutha junction lu vida..athavumbo Korach kachodam kitum

scenes.title: The Building Fire
scenes.description: A building burning in the background with orange and red flames. A man watches the fire calmly from a distance. Cinematic composition, dramatic lighting, high contrast.

scenes.title: The Mysterious Box
scenes.description: A vehicle parked. Saathan Xaviour stands in front of it opening a box placed on top of the vehicle. Mysterious aura, cinematic Malayalam comic style, suspicious look.
scenes.dialogue: Saathan Xaviour: ithentha soma..ninte appante ayurvedha kadaya?

scenes.title: The Duplicate Note
scenes.description: Discussion between a man and Lazar examining a currency note carefully under a light. High detail on the note, dramatic shading. Comic panel composition.
scenes.dialogue: Lazar: Kalakki lasazerta,orginal etha dupluctae etha enn reserve bankinu polum thirich ariyan patila.

scenes.title: National Hero
scenes.description: Official government office scene. An official in a suit shakes hands with and congratulates Shaji Pappan (black shirt, red mundu). National flags in the background. Style: Heroic, formal, cinematic lighting.
scenes.dialogue: Official: Mr shaji ,congrats,we have found out that this Came to u by mistake.the whole nation is proud of u
